versions.version_description: You won't need a capo for this. Hopefully it is correct, feel free to correct me in the comments otherwise. Enjoy x.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
BLUEBERRY FAYGO

[ch]Gm9[/ch]   353335
[tab][ch]C13[/ch]   X32335
C/F   XX3553 ( can by played as Fmaj7 or Fmaj9 )[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]    X57575
[Intro][/tab]
